role: Automation scripts for building, testing, validating, and publishing the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: This directory contains all automation and tooling scripts that support the development lifecycle, including build and watch processes, end-to-end verification, protocol validation, database schema migration, placeholder publishing, release gate checks, and terminal demo recordings.

children.role: Build and distribution automation script for the ArchSpine project
Demonstration script for terminal recording showing ArchSpine CLI workflow
Automated development build watcher for the ArchSpine project
End-to-end verification test for ASTExtractor across multiple programming languages
Demonstration script for generating a terminal recording of ArchSpine CLI commands
Defines the automated process for publishing the initial placeholder version of the ArchSpine package to the official npm registry.
Automated release gate script that enforces a sequence of quality checks before deployment.
Schema migration and maintenance documentation for the ArchSpine cache database.
Validation script for ensuring the integrity of ArchSpine schema definitions and example files.
